heading: Collection of fees under temporary protected status program
label: 1254b Collection of fees under temporary protected status program
notes: CodificationThis section was enacted as part of the Department of Homeland Security Appropriations Act, 2010, and not as part of the Immigration and Nationality Act which comprises this chapter.

children.label: a
children.text: In addition to collection of registration fees described in , fees for fingerprinting services, biometric services, and other necessary services may be collected when administering the program described in .section 1254a(c)(1)(B) of this titlesection 1254a of this title

children.label: b
children.text: Subsection (a) shall be construed to apply for fiscal year 1998 and each fiscal year thereafter.
